title: Gymnopteris semipinnatifida
taxonomy: Gymnopteris semipinnatifida is classified as a species of fern within the family Cyatheaceae. It belongs to the genus Gymnopteris and is a vascular plant. The classification of Gymnopteris semipinnatifida can be broken down as follows: kingdom Plantae, division Pteridophyta, class Polypodiopsida, order Cyatheales, family Cyatheaceae, genus Gymnopteris, and species G. semipinnatifida. This fern is native to the tropical regions of Asia. The specific classification may vary depending on the source, but Cyatheaceae is generally accepted as its family.
